full_text:
Fu Xun (Gongti) 傅巽 (公悌)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Xun (傅巽), styledGongti (公悌), was born in Beidi. Advised Liu Cong to surrender, urged Cao Cao to become a Duke and Cao Pi to become Emperor. Fu Xun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Biao, and the Wei Kingdom. Fu Xun lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
